title: Reclaiming Activities Board for Emails and Activities View?
excerpt: If the Activities board was deleted in monday.com for displaying information via the Emails and Activities view on a specific item, is there a way to reclaim or replicate this process to where the previously logged data …

posts.author: monikawhittington (Monika Whittington)
posts.cookedHtml:
If the Activities board was deleted in monday.com for displaying information via the Emails and Activities view on a specific item, is there a way to reclaim or replicate this process to where the previously logged data will show again or is this information lost?

If so, how can the Activities board be replicated to show the data in the future?

Thank you in advance!

posts.author: FredBaker (Integrated Human | Authorized Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Not sure about the details of your project, but deleted boards are retained in the recycle bin for 30 days.

The Recycle Bin – Support (monday.com)

It may still be that you can recover the missing board.

posts.author: Tom3 (Tom Tomaszewski)
posts.cookedHtml: How does one create the automatic Activities board?
